attributes.title: [Airflow OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Scheduler health, task outcomes, executor capacity, and DAG processing at a glance.

params.markdown:
## [Airflow OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides a health summary for Apache Airflow:
- Scheduler heartbeats (liveness)
- Task success vs failure rate
- Executor slot availability
- DAG import errors and parse health

query.esql:
TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler_heartbeat IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.scheduler_heartbeat)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler_heartbeat IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.scheduler_heartbeat)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti_successes IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.ti_successes)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti_successes IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.ti_successes)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti_failures IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.ti_failures)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti_failures IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.ti_failures)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.executor.open_slots IS NOT NULL
| STATS slots = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.open_slots))

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.executor.open_slots IS NOT NULL
| STATS slots = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.open_slots))

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.dag_processing.import_errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS errs = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.dag_processing.import_errors))

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.dag_processing.import_errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS errs = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.dag_processing.import_errors))

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving IS NOT NULL
| STATS starving = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving))

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving IS NOT NULL
| STATS starving = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving))

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler_heartbeat IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.scheduler_heartbeat) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler_heartbeat IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.scheduler_heartbeat) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Task Success vs Failures Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| STATS successes = SUM(airflow.ti_successes) WHERE airflow.ti_successes IS NOT NULL, failures = SUM(airflow.ti_failures) WHERE airflow.ti_failures IS NOT NULL BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| STATS successes = SUM(airflow.ti_successes) WHERE airflow.ti_successes IS NOT NULL, failures = SUM(airflow.ti_failures) WHERE airflow.ti_failures IS NOT NULL BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.executor.open_slots IS NOT NULL OR airflow.executor.queued_tasks IS NOT NULL OR airflow.executor.running_tasks IS NOT NULL
| STATS open = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.open_slots)), queued = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.queued_tasks)), running = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.running_tasks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.executor.open_slots IS NOT NULL OR airflow.executor.queued_tasks IS NOT NULL OR airflow.executor.running_tasks IS NOT NULL
| STATS open = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.open_slots)), queued = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.queued_tasks)), running = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.running_tasks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: DAG Import Errors and Queue Size

query.esql:
TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.dag_processing.import_errors IS NOT NULL OR airflow.dag_processing.file_path_queue_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS import_errors = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.dag_processing.import_errors)), queue_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.dag_processing.file_path_queue_size)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.dag_processing.import_errors IS NOT NULL OR airflow.dag_processing.file_path_queue_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS import_errors = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.dag_processing.import_errors)), queue_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.dag_processing.file_path_queue_size)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC
